description: The DebugFieldAdapterTest is used with DebugFieldAdapter to test the accuracy. If set properly, the ``InvertedColor`` should flash between inverted and not inverted every frame.

fields.InvertedColor: ``SourceColor`` inverted. Doesn't do this when this component is by itself. Is set to ``SourceColor`` every time this component changes in any way.
fields.SourceColor: The source color. Doesn't affect or is changed by anything. Except for sets or drives.

usage: Is a test item. Is not needed to be used by the user.
